title: CCUS Humber capture project market survey
body: "DESNZ is inviting projects that intend to capture and/or store their carbon in or near the Humber region to complete the CCUS Humber capture project market survey. The survey aims to update the Department’s understanding of the region’s carbon capture projects and support wider policy development.  The CCUS Humber capture project market survey is open to any project that may seek to connect by pipeline to ECC’s Humber network or to Viking CCS’s network, or connect via non-pipeline transport (NPT) to either ECC’s Endurance store, the Bunter Closure Stores or the Viking CCS store.  More details can be found online at https://www.northernendurancepartnership.co.uk or https://www.vikingccs.co.uk.  Please note, participation in this exercise does not constitute entry into a selection process nor is there any guarantee that a selection process will be run in the future or that any subsidy support will be available.   Please respond by completing the response form available on this page and sending it to ccushumber@energysecurity.gov.uk by close of play on Friday 13 February 2026.    Business models   Industrial Carbon Capture Business Models Update (November 2025) Dispatchable Power Agreement Business Model Summary Hydrogen production business model Greenhouse gas removals (GGR): business model CCUS Market Engagement – Sector Business Models: Power BECCS   "
